c1095782c058.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
c1095782c058.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
c1095782c058.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

b770c6179eb9.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
b770c6179eb9.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
b770c6179eb9.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

b091de57c53d.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
b091de57c53d.description: Last inspected 2.1 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
b091de57c53d.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
b091de57c53d.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

7fd07f54da2a.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
7fd07f54da2a.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
7fd07f54da2a.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

ce24d441f8a1.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
ce24d441f8a1.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

7df4f1c1093f.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
7df4f1c1093f.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
7df4f1c1093f.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

03d249e2a83e.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
03d249e2a83e.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
03d249e2a83e.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

4a618efe9a53.title: Ranked #9 of 9 locally — peers are ahead
4a618efe9a53.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

8fd1457a8552.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
8fd1457a8552.description: You trail peers by 2.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

6cf1774ed758.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
6cf1774ed758.description: You trail peers by 2.4 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
